sentence: En Santa Cruz hace un calor tremendo al mediodía.
ipa: en santa kɾus ase un kaloɾ tɾemendo al meðjoðia
gloss_en: In Santa Cruz it is tremendously hot at noon.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: El camba toma tereré bajo la sombra del árbol.
ipa: el kamba toma teɾeɾe baxo la sombɾa del aɾbol
gloss_en: The camba drinks tereré in the shade of the tree.
notes: cross-word sandhi elision; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Mi tía prepara majadito con charque y arroz.
ipa: mi tia pɾepaɾa maxaðito kon tʃaɾke i aros
gloss_en: My aunt makes majadito with jerky and rice.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Los chicos se bañan en el río toda la tarde.
ipa: los tʃikos se baɲan en el rio toða la taɾde
gloss_en: The kids swim in the river all afternoon.
notes: palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Vamos a la plaza a comer sonso y cuñapé.
ipa: bamos a la plasa a komeɾ sonso i kuɲape
gloss_en: Let's go to the square to eat sonso and cuñapé.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: La señora vende yuca frita en la esquina.
ipa: la seɲoɾa bende ʝuka fɾita en la eskina
gloss_en: The lady sells fried cassava on the corner.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Aquel caballo pasta tranquilo en el campo.
ipa: akel kaβaʝo pasta tɾankilo en el kampo
gloss_en: That horse grazes calmly in the field.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: El loro grita fuerte sobre la palmera.
ipa: el loɾo ɡɾita fweɾte sobɾe la palmeɾa
gloss_en: The parrot squawks loudly atop the palm tree.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Nosotros escuchamos taquirari en la fiesta.
ipa: nosotɾos eskutʃamos takiɾaɾi en la fjesta
gloss_en: We listen to taquirari at the party.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: ¿Vos querés un vaso de jugo de tamarindo?
ipa: bos keɾes un baso de xuɣo de tamaɾindo
gloss_en: Do you want a glass of tamarind juice?
notes: cross-word sandhi elision; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: La lluvia moja los caminos de tierra colorada.
ipa: la ʝubja moxa los kaminos de tjera koloɾaða
gloss_en: The rain soaks the red-earth roads.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Mi hermano trabaja en la chacra de caña.
ipa: mi eɾmano tɾaβaxa en la tʃakɾa de kaɲa
gloss_en: My brother works in the sugarcane plot.
notes: palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Prende el ventilador, que el calor es fuerte.
ipa: pɾende el bentilaðoɾ ke el kaloɾ es fweɾte
gloss_en: Turn on the fan, the heat is strong.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: El río crece cuando llueve en el monte.
ipa: el rio kɾese kwando ʝwebe en el monte
gloss_en: The river rises when it rains in the bush.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Comimos locro de gallina con mucho ají.
ipa: komimos lokɾo de ɡaʝina kon mutʃo axi
gloss_en: We ate chicken locro with plenty of chilli.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Los peones cortan la caña desde temprano.
ipa: los peones koɾtan la kaɲa desde tempɾano
gloss_en: The labourers cut the cane from early on.
notes: palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Trae hielo para el refresco de los niños.
ipa: tɾae jelo paɾa el refɾesko de los niɲos
gloss_en: Bring ice for the children's drink.
notes: palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: La niña juega con su muñeca en el patio.
ipa: la niɲa xweɣa kon su muɲeka en el patjo
gloss_en: The girl plays with her doll in the yard.
notes: palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; final [u]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: El vecino cría chanchos y gallinas.
ipa: el besino kɾia tʃantʃos i ɡaʝinas
gloss_en: The neighbour raises pigs and hens.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Corre a comprar pan antes que cierren la tienda.
ipa: kore a kompɾaɾ pan antes ke sjeren la tjenda
gloss_en: Run to buy bread before the shop closes.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.
